import { GameStat } from "../../objects/game-stat"; interface GameStatComponentProps{ gameStats : GameStat[] } const GameStatTable = (gameStatProps : GameStatComponentProps) => { return( <>
{gameStatProps.gameStats.map(f => <> )}
Player Pld Goals Assists GSOs Shots Tackles
{f.playerName} {f.apps} {f.goals} {f.assists} {f.gso} {f.shots} {f.tackles}
); } export default GameStatTable;
